meta_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Git with AI to overcome debugging hurdles. This beginner-level guide covers Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your dev journey.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of process. By pairing Git version control with AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you can isolate errors, revert broken states, and generate precise fixes. This workflow turns every bug into a structured learning milestone for your portfolio.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your code—which worked five minutes ago—is now throwing a wall of red text. You’re stuck, the deadline is looming, and that feeling of impostor syndrome starts to creep in. Every developer has been here, staring at a cryptic traceback, wondering if they’re cut out for this.

But here is the secret: engineering isn't about writing perfect code; it's about mastering the feedback loop. By integrating Git with AI, you stop ‘guessing’ at fixes and start architecting solutions. We are going to transform your debugging process from a chaotic struggle into a surgical, professional workflow that makes you faster, smarter, and more confident.

steps.title: Initialize Your Safety Net
steps.description: Before you attempt any fix, ensure your current state is committed. This allows you to 'time travel' if the AI suggestions lead you astray.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current working directory and identify the core logic causing the recent regression.
steps.claude_code_command: git add . && git commit -m "checkpoint: before debugging regression"

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use AI to analyze your error logs against the specific Git diff that introduced the bug.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compare the current code state with the previous commit and explain why this specific change caused the runtime error.

steps.title: Generate a Surgical Fix
steps.description: Don't ask the AI to rewrite the whole file; ask for a specific patch to the identified function.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a minimal code change to fix the identified bug while maintaining the existing architectural patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude task 'apply minimal patch to fix the null pointer exception in auth.js'

steps.title: Verify Through Automation
steps.description: Use AI to write a unit test that proves the bug is gone, then run it to confirm.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test case that reproduces this bug and fails, then suggest how to make it pass.

steps.title: Document the Learning
steps.description: Commit your fix with a descriptive message. This builds a history of problem-solving for your future employer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize this debugging session into a concise technical commit message.
steps.claude_code_command: git commit -m "fix: resolved memory leak in user service"

pro_tips: Always commit before asking an AI to refactor; it prevents 'refactor fatigue' where you lose track of working code.
Use 'claude diff' to see exactly what the AI changed before accepting the code injection.
Treat your Git history as a story of your progress; employers love seeing how you debugged complex issues.
If the AI suggests a major rewrite, ask it to 'break this into three smaller, testable functions' to keep your code maintainable.
Keep your Git branches short-lived; create a 'fix-bug-name' branch for every AI-assisted debugging session.
content.next_steps: Once you've mastered this loop, start contributing to open-source projects. Use these same Git + AI techniques to submit your first pull request.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the workflow, and the mindset to stop struggling and start building. Don't let a bug stop your momentum; let it be the reason you level up. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
